# AOE Friendly Links Knowledge Base

> A crawlable knowledge base for the websites listed in api.aoe.top Friendly.all.

This site mirrors structured, LLM-friendly text for 37 linked websites. It provides an overview, a compact full index, per-site Markdown files, per-page Markdown files, and JSON APIs.

Generated: 2026-06-18T03:10:14.671Z
Source: https://github.com/aoe-top/api.aoe.top/blob/master/server/utils/friendly.ts

## Recommended Entry Points

- Full index summary: https://llms.aoe.top/llms-full.txt
- Site index JSON: https://llms.aoe.top/api/sites.json
- Page index JSON: https://llms.aoe.top/api/pages.json
- Full content JSON: https://llms.aoe.top/api/content.json
- Sitemap: https://llms.aoe.top/sitemap.xml

## Crawl Policy

Search, retrieval, general web, and user-triggered AI crawlers are allowed. Listed training-only or broad AI crawlers are disallowed in robots.txt.
